understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate the player to the goal gem tile (+) by leveraging gravity and tile interactions while avoiding hazards like spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was only allowed horizontally with MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT, after which the player would automatically fall in the gravity direction (DOWN in this episode) until landing. Clicking (CLICK) could remove breakable blocks to open new paths. Hazards like spikes caused instant loss, while undo could potentially revert mistakes. The structured state previewed landing destinations and available corridors to aid planning.
